summary: Classified the Feishu interactive-card parsing cluster from the hydrated preflight artifact. #38776 is the narrowest repairable canonical PR path, but it is not merge-ready because review-bot findings remain unresolved and full checks include failures; emit a repair fix artifact instead of merge or close. Broad overlapping PRs #42218 and #45936 are superseded but fix-first closure is blocked until the canonical repair lands. Direct inbound-card work (#41609/#56795) and post-format fallback work (#60380/#60383) remain related follow-up subfamilies.
